summary:
The primary method for directly working with RNA among those provided involves Reverse Transcription Quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (RT-qPCR), whereas others are more centered around either DNA operations or indirect use of RNA through antibody-based methods such as Western Blotting. Thus,
\[ \boxed{\text{C}} \] represents an RNA-focused approach compared to alternatives emphasizing different aspects related but less direct engagement with nucleotide bases. 

(Note: There seems to be inconsistency between initial answer box (\(\boxed{B}\)) vs final boxed selection; assuming C was intended.) 
This summary encapsulates why RT-qPCR uniquely fits being "primarily" about handling RNA within this set while highlighting differences noted earlier regarding each option type.
